body:
goodtransgirl:

Longing for that first intimacy, where we find ourselves snuggled away somewhere quiet. The first kiss, which is tentative for a moment before we both lean in again, as if we have been holding our breath all night long.

Loving the way it would stretch on, slowly and deliberately. The little pauses where our foreheads touch, just long enough to appreciate the sensation before I rub my noes against yours, we laugh softly, and continue kissing. The places where I’d pull back for a second and say hi to you while burying my face in your shoulder before being absorbed into her warmth.

Our hands roaming in that sweet, interested way, those quick touches on skin where a sleeve or a collar or fabric may not quite meet, little sparks flying from both our bodies. A make-out session that wavers from gentle to hungry to gentle again, warm and a little vertiginous, the world narrowing down to include only us.

But then, of course, one of us has to go check the time. Responsibilities, morning calls, alarms set. Thus, we reluctantly drift ap
